demo_reading_p: Umbhalo wenkundla uzozilungisa ngokwawo. Oku kwenza ukuthi kufundeke kalula kubo bonke abasebenzisi.
profile_danger_desc: I-akhawunti yakho izobekwa unomphela esimweni sokuthi AYISEBENZI.
profile_danger_final_confirm_msg: I-PIN iqinisekisiwe. Ngokuqinisekisa manje, iseshini yakho izovalwa ngokushesha.

seo.title: Izeluleko zezokuphepha | Ukuphathwa kwendawo
seo.desc: Umhlahlandlela wokuvikelwa kwedatha nokuvikeleka kwedijithali webandla.

security.hero_sub: Imikhuba ebalulekile yokunakekela ubumfihlo bakho nemininingwane yakho.

estafas.title: 1. Ukukhwabanisa kwe-Inthanethi
estafas.desc: Okuqukethwe kwedijithali okungelona iqiniso kungalingisa amazwi nobuso obaziwayo ukuze kwebiwe imininingwane yakho noma imali yakho.

tags.prevention_info: Uma ucindezelwa ukuba unikeze imali noma idatha ebucayi: yima, cabanga, futhi uqinisekise ngaso sonke isikhathi.
tags.verification_info: Nqamula ukuxhumana bese uzifonela wena lowo muntu usebenzisa indlela evikelekile neyaziwayo.
tags.deepfake_info: Ubuchwepheshe bokulingisa umuntu. Ungathembi kuphela lokho okubonayo noma okuzwayo esikrinini.

physical.title: 2. Ukuphepha kwefoni
physical.desc: Ifoni yakho iyisikhiye esiyinhloko. Idivayisi engenalo ukukhiya isikrini iyisicabha esivulekile kuyo yonke impilo yakho eyimfihlo.

tags.biometry_info: Setha ubuso (FaceID) noma umunwe. Kuphephe kakhulu kunephethini umuntu angayibona ehlombe lakho.
tags.updates_info: Ungayishayi indiva imiyalezo 'yenguqulo entsha'; ivamise ukuvala izikhala zezokuphepha ezitholakale muva nje.
tags.encryption_info: Qinisekisa ukuthi ukuvikelwa kwe-disk kuyasebenza ukuze uvikele amafayela nezithombe zakho ekuntshontshweni.

keys.title: 3. Amaphasiwedi anamandla
keys.desc: Gwema ukusebenzisa imininingwane esobala. Ukuhlaselwa okuningi kwenzeka ngenxa yamaphasiwedi abuthakathaka.

tags.2fa_info: Vula ukuqinisekiswa kwezinyathelo ezimbili kuwo wonke ama-akhawunti akho. Kuyisivikelo esibaluleke kakhulu.
tags.robustness_info: Sebenzisa imishwana emide esikhundleni samagama alula. Isibonelo: 'Blue-Sky-2026!' ingcono kakhulu kune 'peter123'.
tags.passphrases_info: Imishwana emide kunzima kakhulu kumakhompiyutha abahlaseli ukuba bayiqhekeze namuhla.

phishing.title: 4. Ukubona iGwegwe
phishing.desc: Izigilamkhuba zenza sengathi zivela ebhange noma kubantu bezobuchwepheshe ukuze zibe idatha yakho ngokukwesabisa.

tags.urgency_info: Uma umlayezo uthi 'I-akhawunti yakho izovalwa eklasini eli-1', ngokuqinisekile wukukhwabanisa.
tags.links_info: Hlola i-URL ngokucophelela. Abakhwabanisi bavame ukusebenzisa amagama afana ne 'g00gle.net' esikhundleni se 'google.com'.
tags.files_info: Ungalokothi uvule amafayela ongawalindele, ikakhulukazi uma enezijobelelo ezinjenge .ZIP, .EXE, noma .BAT.

family.title: 5. Ifa Lezingane
family.desc: Izingane azinalo ulwazi lokubona imigibe. Zifundise ukuthi lokho okufakwa ku-inthanethi kuhlala lapho phakade.

tags.identity_info: Gwema ukudalula imininingwane ebucayi ezithombeni zomphakathi, njengeyunifomu yesikole noma indawo okuyo.
tags.strangers_info: Umthetho wegolide wezingane: 'Uma ungabazi mathupha, ababona abangane bangempela'.
tags.privacy_info: Hlola ngezikhathi ezithile izilungiselelo zobumfihlo zezinkundla zokuxhumana namadivayisi amalungu omndeni wakho.

backup.title: 6. Ukugcinwa Kwemininingwane
backup.desc: I-virus ingakhiya noma isuse amafayela akho. Ikhophi ephephe ngempela yileyo enganhunyeziwe kukhompiyutha.

tags.frequency_info: Yenza ikhophi yokuphepha yezithombe namadokhumenti akho abaluleke kakhulu okungenani kanye ngenyanga.
tags.disconnection_info: Kopishela amafayela akho kudrayivu yangaphandle bese uyikhipha kukhompiyutha uma uqeda.
tags.cloud_info: Sebenzisa izinsiza ze-cloud ezine-encryption, kodwa ungathembi zona kuphela njengekhophi eyodwa.
